basics.name: Muhammad Wajahat Shahid
basics.summary: Senior Salesforce Developer with 4+ years of experience delivering enterprise-grade solutions across Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Experience Cloud, and Non-Profit Cloud. Certified Platform Developer I with deep expertise in Apex, Lightning Web Components (LWC), REST/SOAP API integrations, CPQ, and CI/CD pipeline management via SFDX and Unlocked Packages. Proven record of 10x efficiency gains and 40% reduced development cycles. Agentblazer Champion with Agentforce Al experience. Adept at leading cross-functional Agile/Scrum teams globally to deliver scalable, governor-limit-compliant Salesforce architecture.

certifications: Trailhead: Four Star Ranger | 400+ Badges | 300k+ Points | Agentblazer Champion

highlights: Architected and developed Non-Profit Cloud applications aligned to stakeholder requirements, applying scalable Apex design patterns, object modeling, and field-level security best practices.
Led legacy automation modernization, migrating Process Builder workflows to Flow Builder, reducing technical debt and improving org maintainability across the full SDLC.
Implemented Custom Metadata Types and Platform Events to decouple business logic and improve org configurability without code deployments.
Conducted code reviews, enforced governor limit compliance, and established development standards to ensure long-term Salesforce org health.
Coordinated cross-functional Agile/Scrum delivery across developers, admins, QA, and business stakeholders, maintaining 100% sprint completion focus.
Designed and delivered end-to-end Salesforce solutions using Apex classes, triggers, batch jobs, queueable patterns, and LWC components with REST and SOAP API integrations.
Built a dynamic drag-and-drop Schema Builder in Lightning Web Components (LWC), reducing admin configuration time by 50%.
Engineered a multi-object CRUD system spanning Salesforce SObject, Google Firestore, and AWS DynamoDB via Apex callouts and named credentials, saving 40% development time.
Used Postman for REST API testing and documentation; integrated Connected Apps with OAuth 2.0 and JWT for secure third-party authentication.
Managed sandbox environments, change set deployments, and production release cycles ensuring regression-free delivery.
Led technical solutioning across global Agile teams on three continents, translating business requirements into scalable Salesforce architecture with clear technical documentation.
Refactored Apex codebase and optimized governor limit management of Rolustech's flagship AppExchange product, achieving a 10x improvement in platform efficiency.
Modernized CI/CD deployment pipeline with SFDX, Unlocked Packages, and 2GP Managed Packages, improving release efficiency by 30% and enabling modular, version-controlled deployments.
Published multiple enterprise-grade apps to AppExchange, adhering to Salesforce security review standards and ISV packaging best practices.
Designed and implemented CPQ configurations including product rules, pricing rules, and quote templates to automate complex B2B quoting workflows.
Delivered Salesforce CRM solutions using declarative tools (Flow, Process Builder, Approval Processes, Validation Rules) and programmatic development (Apex, LWC, Visualforce).
Integrated Salesforce with Twilio, Gmail, Outlook, Mailchimp, LinkedIn, Stripe, and Heroku using REST APIs, Apex callouts, and OAuth 2.0 authentication.
Implemented Open CTI for telephony integration, Einstein Activity Capture for CRM data enrichment, and Zapier for cross-platform workflow automation.
Wrote optimized SOQL and SOSL queries with bulkification best practices to process large data volumes within governor limits.

education.institution: University of Engineering and Technology (UET) Lahore
courses: OOP, Data Structures & Algorithms, Software Engineering, UI/UX Design, Database Management Systems, Mobile App Development, Artificial Intelligence, Information Security

projects.name: RolusGPT AI-Powered Salesforce Chatbot
technologies: Salesforce, LWC, Python, FastAPI, Heroku, ChatGPT API
highlights: Rearchitected Al response pipeline for 10x faster query processing and 35% improvement in response accuracy by integrating ChatGPT API with Salesforce via Apex callouts and named credentials.
Built and deployed Python REST APIs using FastAPI on Heroku; connected to Salesforce via Connected Apps with OAuth 2.0.
Developed an LWC-based conversational chatbot interface providing 60% faster data access;
implemented Tabulator.js and Chart.js for real-time data visualization inside Salesforce.

projects.name: Clinux - Healthcare Appointment Booking Platform
technologies: Service Cloud, Experience Cloud, Apex, Flow
highlights: Architected a patient-facing Appointment Booking portal on Experience Cloud, improving scheduling efficiency by 35% via custom Apex controllers and dynamic LWC components.
Integrated FullCalendar.js for real-time scheduling; built automated reminder workflows using Flow and Platform Events, improving operational efficiency by 45%.
Configured Service Cloud case management, entitlement rules, and escalation workflows to streamline patient support operations.

Agentforce, Einstein Activity Capture, Flow Builder, Process Builder, Approval Processes, Platform Events, Change Data Capture
CPQ, Lightning App Builder, Dynamic Forms, Dynamic Actions, Schema Builder, Validation Rules, Duplicate Rules, Connected Apps, Web-to-Lead, Web-to-Case, SSO, Reports & Dashboards
Apex (Triggers, Queueable, Batch, Scheduled, Future), SOQL, SOSL, LWC, Aura, Visualforce, Custom Metadata Types
REST API, SOAP API, Bulk API, Streaming API, Named Credentials, OAuth 2.0, JWT, Twilio, Stripe, Mailchimp, Heroku, Zapier, ChatGPT API, Google Workspace
SFDX (Salesforce CLI), Unlocked Packages, 2GP Managed Packages, Change Sets, AppExchange Publishing, Sandbox Management
Data Loader, Workbench, Profiles, Permission Sets, Permission Set Groups, Sharing Rules, Role Hierarchy, Field-Level Security, OWD, Record Types
